provenance.gates_inherited_from: P3 (p3_test_constants.json) -- same discriminator protocol (6 chains >= 25 ticks, >= 20 bracketed targets, order-intrinsic profiles), re-validated at N=600 on uniform 2D orders: 10/10 valid, heldout 0.016-0.084 (max < 0.10), null_gap 0.106-0.322 (min > 0.10), truth 0.10-0.21 (recovers true lightcone x = i - pi_i)
provenance.recon: 400k-step dual-start sweep at N=600 eps=0.02: beta=2 and beta=8 continuum (crystal start MELTS, profiles at reference), beta=32 non-continuum (hysteretic; R-start drifts to a layered state n0 3.8x ref, X-start stays near bipartite S=-108.6 vs theory -120). beta_c in (8, 32).
provenance.eps_choice: eps*N = 12 held at the P4 value so the crystal's action advantage S_bip = eps N (2 - eps N) = -120 is scale-invariant while entropy grows with N (continuum window widens: P4 beta_c in (2,3) at N=100 -> here beta_c in (8,32)).
provenance.expectation_semantics: pass at a continuum beta iff >= 75% of its 9 configs (3 seeds x 3 equilibrium samples) clear all three gates; block at the crystal control iff 0 of its configs clear the gates (structural block counts as non-pass).
provenance.note: Frozen before any stage-B chain was run. Confirmatory seeds 100-102 disjoint from calibration (0-9) and recon (50-63) seeds. Do not edit after freezing.
